data.title: Builders FirstSource names a digital strategy and ecommerce leader
data.description: Narayan has more than 20 years of experience in digital and enterprise technology leadership. She previously held leadership roles at PepsiCo, Microsoft and Amazon.

data.title: DHL: AI, social media, and delivery demands redefine ecommerce
data.description: 70% of respondents say they expect to do most of their shopping through social media platforms such as TikTok, Instagram, and Facebook by 2030.

data.title: Personalization can damage B2B customer loyalty and sales
data.description: “More than half of customers feel overwhelmed or rushed by traditional personalization tactics at least once in a purchase journey, especially during complex transition points,” said Audrey Brosnan, senior director analyst at Gartner

data.title: Ecommerce deal-making remains steady so far this year
data.description: The outlook for ecommerce enablement investments in 2025 is positive, but factors like tariffs and economic uncertainty will continue to impact deal activity, according to PitchBook.

data.title: Digital transformation gathers momentum among manufacturers
data.description: The shift toward digital investment is driven by several factors, including persistent workforce gaps, inflationary pressures, and ongoing supply chain challenges.
